name: Torian Resources
description: Torian Resources Limited is an Australian-based gold exploration and development company focused on the Eastern Goldfields region of Western Australia. The company maintains an extensive and strategic land holding, comprising multiple projects and significant tenure within this highly prospective mining district. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: TNR), Torian is dedicated to identifying and advancing commercially mineable mineral resources. Through systematic exploration and strategic acquisitions, the company aims to unlock value within its tenement portfolio, which is situated in one of the world's most prolific gold-producing regions.
